title: KiroRails Security Guardrails
description: Check critical file changes against security standards when saving migration, auth, model, or config files
instructions:
Review the saved file for security issues:
1. For migration files: warn if DROP without comment, CREATE INDEX without CONCURRENTLY, NOT NULL without DEFAULT
2. For security/auth files: flag hardcoded credentials, weak hashing (MD5/SHA-1), overly permissive access
3. For model/entity files: warn if fields removed or types changed (could break contracts)
4. For config files: flag values that look like secrets — these should be environment variables
Keep warnings concise — one line per issue.
